Civil War

"Welcome to the frontline."

6.8
2024MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

In the near future, a group of war journalists attempt to survive while reporting the truth as the United States stands on the brink of civil war.

Tags

snipernew york cityrace against timewashington dc, usathe white housecivil warpost-traumatic stress disorder (ptsd)war crimesphotographermilitiajournalismdystopiawar photographerroad trippresident
